title: user.deactivated payload (v1)
description: A user was deactivated in a tenant. HONEST STATUS: DECLARED-BUT-UNUSED, same as user.invited. The USER_EVENTS stream and the typed UserDeactivatedPayloadSchema exist, but no service publishes or subscribes to user.deactivated today. This schema documents the typed contract shape for when the event is wired.
